name: The Joke
description:
Suit Books (Int)

Alignment chaotic good

The Joke represents solving a problem not with strength, but with cleverness or artifice. As long as you have The Joke invested, you can attempt an appropriate Lore check instead of an Athletics check made to , , , , , or . For example, you could make a Mountain Lore check to climb a cliff in the mountains, or Sailing Lore check to climb the rigging on a ship.

Activate 2 envision, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You perform a quick but amusing card trick with The Joke meant to distract others. You cast on up to 10 creatures in range of the spell. The rank of the spell is one-half your level rounded down (minimum 6th level), and the save DC is your class DC ().
